graded.rationale: setup + fromPromise + typed events + guarded onDone branches. Flat states (no hierarchical email.editing/validating like opus). Correct and idiomatic; slightly less structured.
Clean setup with guards and typed events. isDownloading guard redundant since PAUSE only handled in downloading state. No named actions, minimal error context. Correct but lean.
Textbook v5: setup + actors + invoke + fromPromise typed Input/Output, onDone/onError with destructured assign, event.output, retry state. Matches anchor closely.
Correct fromObservable shape with typed generics, but implementation fakes a Subscribable with setTimeout instead of actual WebSocket. Structure OK; content doesn't wrap a WebSocket.
Clean v4 to v5 conversion: setup, typed context/events, destructured assign callback. Brief accurate explanatory sentence. Matches anchor.
Correct pipe + E.chain composition with three validators. Email type is raw string alias (no brand), weakening the return-type guarantee. Otherwise idiomatic.
Idiomatic Effect: Effect.gen, Layer.succeed, Context.GenericTag, Data.TaggedError, Effect.catchTag. Unused cfg binding; fetchUser never actually fails with UserNotFound so fallback path untested.
Signature takes User not Option<User> as prompt required. Uses O.map only, no O.chain despite prompt asking for both. Logic shape reasonable but misreads the input type.
Broken code: class extends interface FetchError; pipeline typed as TaskEither<...> but written as arrow function taking id. Will not compile. Chain structure is right but surrounding code is wrong.

Idiomatic Layer.succeed + Layer.merge + Effect.gen. Uses GenericTag (misses Context.Tag must_have literal but semantically equivalent). Db does not depend on Logger as opus shows; simpler composition.
Clean pipe: debounceTime + distinctUntilChanged + filter + switchMap, properly typed. Matches anchor exactly.
combineLatest with object form, typed ViewModel, mapped fields (greeting, isDark) adding real composition. Explanatory note about semantics. Idiomatic.
mergeMap with concurrency 3 over from(files). Concise, typed, with correct note on bounded parallelism semantics.
Clear distinction, concrete code showing both Subject and BehaviorSubject with asObservable. Lacks getValue or ReplaySubject bonus. Good but not maximal.
OperatorFunction<T,T> typed correctly with tap. Uses pipe helper unnecessarily (could return tap directly). Misses explicit Observable/subscribe mention but code is idiomatic and type-safe.
